recommendation.reason: Lowest-token quality-passing candidate after A failed the required handoff field gate.

limitations: This run used the repo-local five-profile quality-equivalence shortlist, not the full 180-candidate default matrix.
Quality and telemetry both came from isolated Codex CLI candidate runs.
CLI telemetry is exact for the CLI runs but is only a proxy for any future subagent runner.
No private/raw payload, old transcript, secret, real handoff mutation, external notification, route switch, or live pilot was used.
